items.title: Could Buying JPMorgan Chase Stock Today Set You Up for Life?
items.author: James Brumley
items.description: JPMorgan Chase is a solid financial company, but its growth prospects may be limited due to industry-wide factors like market saturation and limited money supply growth. While it's a good dividend payer, it may not be the best choice for investors seeking explosive, sustained gains.
